headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks We Approach with Caution
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

headline: Axion BioSystems and Agilent Technologies Resolve Litigation
summary: ATLANTA, April 21, 2026--Axion BioSystems, Inc., a leading provider of live-cell analysis technologies, today announced that Agilent Technologies, Inc. and Axion BioSystems have fully resolved the issues in the two lawsuits between them, pending in the United States District Court for the District of Delaware, pursuant to the terms of a confidential settlement agreement.
